arts.ttl: Why Ruben Amorim turned to Chido Obi as his only Manchester United sub vs Tottenham
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim was forced to pick one of the most inexperienced benches in Man Utd history at Tottenham and he made just one late change.

arts.ttl: 'Maddison dictates the game' - how Man Utd gave Spurs too much space
arts.sum: Match Of The Day 2 pundits Ashley Williams and Micah Richards explain how Manchester United made it too easy for Tottenham as the hosts won 1-0.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou reveals triple Tottenham injury concern as Kevin Danso fitness update delivered
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou reveals that three Tottenham Hotspur players picked up knocks in their 1-0 Premier League triumph over Manchester United on Sunday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou joins exclusive club as Tottenham achieve club Premier League first in Man United victory
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou joins an exclusive club of managers and also led Tottenham Hotspur to a Premier League first in their 1-0 success over Manchester United on Sunday.
It’s only one game, but I thought today was an important game if we were going to start that progress. We’re in the Europa League this year and we’ve got an opportunity there to make an impact.

arts.ttl: Postecoglou: Vicario and Maddison stood up for us
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur head coach Ange Postecoglou praised Guglielmo Vicario and James Maddison after the pair returned from injury to play key roles in Sunday's 1-0 win over Manchester United. It was Maddison's fourth goal in his last four Premier League starts, with the matchwinner delighted to respond after receiving some criticism earlier this week.

arts.ttl: Analysis: Revitalised Spurs expose a Man Utd midfield missing youthful energy
arts.sum: Amad – who has scored or assisted eight of United’s 16 league goals under Amorim (50 pr cent) - is expected to miss the rest of the season, leaving United reliant upon Alejandro Garnacho, a forward they were open to selling in January, and Zirkzee. Tottenham Hotspur are leaving an injury crisis just as Manchester United are entering theirs and, on the evidence of the first half in particular, that means Spurs are ready to shoot up the table and United, if it’s even possible, falling deeper into trouble.

arts.ttl: 'My job is so hard' - Amorim frustrated as Man Utd lose again
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim says his job is "so hard" after defeat at Tottenham on Sunday leaves his side 15th in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Amorim vows to stick with beliefs after Manchester United’s loss at Tottenham
arts.athr: Ed Aarons at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium
arts.sum: ‘We need to stop focusing on big picture. Just next game’ Maddison scores winner to ease pressure on Postecoglou Ruben Amorim has insisted that he will “stick with my beliefs” after watching his injury-hit Manchester United side endure a 12th Premier League defeat of the campaign that leaves them 15th in the table. A first-half goal from James Maddison, who celebrated by putting his finger to his lips in response to criticism he received last week from Roy Keane, sealed Tottenham’s first win at home in the Premier League since they beat Aston Villa here in November. On his return from injury, Guglielmo Vicario produced a brilliant save to deny an Alejandro Garnacho shot in the second half. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Djed Spence proves clear point to Ange Postecoglou vs Man United with Spurs boss facing big dilemma - Opinion
arts.sum: Djed Spence claimed his second consecutive Premier League Man of the Match award for his impressive display against Manchester United. Tottenham fans hailed Spence’s performance...
